Free

$0/month

Perfect for getting started and exploring the platform.

What's Included

  • Guided Storytelling (Limited)
  • Legacy Messaging (1 recipient)
  • Basic Family Tree
  • Secure Cloud Storage (1GB)

Yearly

$99/year

Our most popular plan for preserving your full legacy.

What's Included

  • Full Profile Access
  • Unlimited Storytelling Prompts
  • Unlmited Legacy Messaging
  • Interactive Family Tree
  • Secure Cloud Storage (50GB)

A permanent digital heirloom for generations to come.

What's Included

  • All Yearly Features
  • Advanced AI Personalization
  • Legacy Delivery Scheduling
  • Unlimited Cloud Storage
